text: ‘Let the Lord keep watch’; in the Hebrew text, these words are explained as the origin of another place-name, Maspha.
There may have been some confusion in the text of this passage; perhaps Jacob in verse 45 is a mistake for Laban, whose ‘kinsmen’ have been mentioned in verse 23.
This is the sense of the Latin; the Hebrew text is confused, and leaves it doubtful whether one God or a plurality of Gods is meant.
